response.justification: Bogdan possesses excellent technical and architectural skills, along with a strong open-source background. However, he falls critically short on the strict C1 German language requirement and lacks the executive-level team management and formal IT consulting leadership experience necessary for this Head of Development role.
strengths: Extensive experience designing and building modern software architectures and microservices.
Deep commitment to open-source technologies, including founding the GISCollective platform.
Active in mentoring and knowledge sharing, demonstrated by organizing technical workshops and courses.
concerns: Only has basic German language skills, failing the strict minimum C1 requirement for client advisement.
Lacks explicit executive-level leadership and formal team management experience.
Missing demonstrated expertise in formal modeling (UML), IT security, and risk compliance.
